programs.title: Sink the Bismarck!
programs.desc: Second World War drama. Kenneth More stars as the British captain charged with finding and destroying the Bismarck, Germany's largest battleship. Directed by Lewis Gilbert.

programs.title: Tooth Fairy
programs.desc: Family fantasy comedy. Dwayne Johnson stars as a tough ice hockey player who is transformed into a real-life fairy as punishment for telling a child that tooth fairies don't exist.

programs.title: Central Intelligence
programs.desc: Action-comedy with Dwayne Johnson and Kevin Hart. Two former school buddies team up to thwart a terrorist plot. But things may not be as they seem. With Amy Ryan and Jason Bateman.

programs.title: The Martian
programs.desc: Matt Damon stars in Ridley Scott's drama about an astronaut who accidentally gets left behind on Mars. Oops. How will he survive and how on earth can he get home.

programs.title: Attack the Block
programs.desc: Sci-fi horror-comedy with John Boyega. Aggressive aliens unwisely pick a tough London estate as the beachhead for their invasion. But the locals are no pushovers..

programs.title: Monster Hunter
programs.desc: Paul WS Anderson's sci-fi action starring Milla Jovovich, based on the game of the same name. A US Army Ranger must fight her way out of a parallel world full of monsters.
